parameters.jsCode: const body = $('Credit Webhook').first().json.body ?? {}; const searchName = String(body.company_name ?? '').toUpperCase().replace(/[.,'’&()/\-]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const companies = Object.values($json ?? {}); const normalize = (value) => String(value ?? '').toUpperCase().replace(/[.,'’&()/\-]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const scored = companies.map((company) => ({ company, score: normalize(company.title).includes(searchName) || searchName.includes(normalize(company.title)) ? 1 : 0, })).filter((entry) => entry.score > 0); const match = scored[0]?.company ?? null; return [{ success: true, data: { company_name: match?.title ?? null, registration_number: match?.cik_str ? `CIK ${String(match.cik_str).padStart(10, '0')}` : null, source_name: 'SEC EDGAR' } }];
